feedItems.description: allocated £6.7m to Council Running Costs (≈£50 per resident)
allocated £5.3m to Planning & Development (≈£39 per resident)
allocated £7.5m to Environment & Streets (≈£56 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £113 (4.8%) to £2484
